title: Document the repository purpose in README
goal: Add a concise repository-purpose section to the README without changing any code or introducing new project claims.
constraints: Do not edit any source code.
Do not invent features that are not already present in the repository.
done_criteria: README contains a clear repository-purpose section.
acceptance_notes: A short, accurate update is preferred over a broad rewrite.
rejection_notes: Reject if additional files are changed or if the README overclaims features.
